description_long: This is a black pickup truck with prominent white and green branding graphics on the hood, sides, and rear, including a logo and text. The vehicle features a four-door cab and an extended cargo bed covered by a hard tonneau cover. The front grille is wide and white, with matching white bumper accents, and the headlights are integrated into the front fascia. The side profile reveals large, black wheels with green hubcap accents and detailed graphic decals, including a stylized figure and gear motifs. The rear view shows red tail lights, a branded tailgate, and additional advertising on the rear window and bumper. The overall design suggests a modern, robust pickup truck used for business or promotional purposes.
description: A black, four-door pickup truck with white and green branding graphics, a covered cargo bed, and bold white grille and bumper accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide white grille, white bumper, and green-and-white branding on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door cab, large black wheels with green accents, and extensive side graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red tail lights, branded tailgate, rear window graphics, and covered cargo bed.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible door handles, side mirrors, and detailed promotional graphics.
